pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage with personalized mix of astrology and tarot content and entry points to all key sections. Serves as the main hub for the personalized feed, shortcuts (today’s horoscope, featured tarot spread/ritual), and global search.
primary_functions: Show a personalized feed based on zodiac, interests, and tarot/astrology balance.
Provide a global search bar to search for articles, horoscopes, and tarot content.
Offer quick access tiles to Daily Horoscopes, Career Horoscopes, Tarot Spreads, Card Meanings, Compatibility, and Moon Phases.
Surface shortcuts to todays horoscope and a featured tarot spread or ritual.
Provide access to user-focused areas such as Reading List, Favorites, Collections, Notes, Planner, and Content Preferences via header/profile controls.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Daily Horoscope quick-access tile
Click Career Horoscope quick-access tile
Click Tarot Spreads quick-access tile
Click Card Meanings quick-access tile
Click Compatibility quick-access tile
Click Moon Phases quick-access tile
Click Ritual Planner shortcut
Click any article card in the personalized feed or featured ritual section
Click any tarot spread card in the recommended spreads section or featured tarot spread
Click a highlighted lunar event from the homepage widgets
Submit global search form in the header
Click Reading List entry under My Library shortcut
Click Favorites entry under My Library shortcut
Click Collections entry under My Library shortcut
Click Notes entry under My Library shortcut
Click Content Preferences in header/profile menu

access_methods.description: Main site logo and 'Home' header link point to index.html
Primary landing page URL for the site

pages.name: Horoscopes
pages.description: Unified horoscope hub that supports daily and career horoscopes with filtering by sign and date/month. Includes tabs or controls for switching between Daily and Career modes and listing weekly career horoscopes.
primary_functions: Let users select horoscope type via tabs or controls (e.g., Daily, Career).
For Daily mode, allow selection of zodiac sign and date (including a Today option) and open the matching daily horoscope article via a View Horoscope button.
For Career mode, allow selection of zodiac sign and month (including Next Month) and display weekly career horoscope cards labeled by week number.
On weekly career cards, provide actions such as Save to Collection, Save to Reading List, and Open Article.
Provide sorting and basic filters (e.g., by week or relevance) for lists of horoscopes when appropriate.

incoming_params.description: Horoscope mode: 'daily' or 'career'. Defaults to 'daily'. Header link uses 'daily'.
Optional preselected zodiac sign (e.g., 'taurus', 'capricorn').
Optional ISO date for daily horoscope selection; if omitted, defaults to Today.
Optional month (1–12) for career horoscopes list. Used with year.
Optional 4-digit year for career horoscopes list. Used with month.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Horoscope' button for a daily horoscope result
Click a weekly career horoscope card title (Week 1, Week 2, etc.)
Click 'View Collection' link after saving weekly horoscopes to a collection (e.g., 'Capricorn Career')
Click 'View Reading List' link after saving daily/weekly horoscopes to Reading List
Click a 'Next Month Career Horoscopes' CTA on the Daily tab

access_methods.description: Header 'Horoscopes' link opens horoscopes.html?type=daily
Homepage tiles link directly into horoscopes.html with appropriate type and preselected sign
Mode, sign, and date/month determined via query parameters for deep-linking daily or career views
Horoscope type/sign/date/month selectors submit to refresh results with updated query parameters

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Generic article page used for daily horoscopes, weekly career horoscopes, Mercury retrograde articles, compatibility readings, and ritual guides. Supports saving, favoriting, collections, comments, and planning rituals.
primary_functions: Display full article content with title, metadata (sign, date, reading time, rating, tags), and body text.
Show contextual call-to-actions such as Save to Reading List, Add to Favorites, and Save to Collection (when applicable, e.g., weekly horoscopes).
Provide a Related Articles section with sort controls (including Rating: High to Low) and inline actions like Save to Reading List for each related item.
Display a comments section showing comment count and existing comments, and provide a form to post a new comment with name and text.
For ritual guide articles, provide a Plan This Ritual or Add to Planner button that opens a scheduling form for the ritual planner.

incoming_params.description: Article.id to display (daily horoscope, career horoscope, Mercury retrograde article, compatibility article, ritual guide, or general article).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a related article title in the Related Articles section
Click a 'Go to Reading List' link after saving an article
Click a 'View Favorites' link after favoriting an article
Click 'View Collection' CTA after saving article to a collection
Click 'Open in Planner' CTA after creating a ritual planner entry from a ritual guide
Click a breadcrumb or related link for more career horoscopes for a sign

access_methods.description: Article detail loaded based on id query parameter
Accessible from lists and cards across the site (home, horoscopes, search, compatibility, moon events, collections, favorites, planner)

pages.name: Tarot Spreads
pages.description: Listing and discovery page for tarot spreads with filters and search. Used to find beginner love spreads and bookmark specific spread guides.
primary_functions: Provide filters for spread attributes such as difficulty level (e.g., Beginner) and theme.
Include a search field to find spreads by keyword (e.g., love).
Display a results list of spread guides with key info: title, difficulty, number of cards, estimated reading time, rating.
Allow opening any spread guide in a new tab or current tab by clicking the title, leading to Tarot Spread Detail.
Optionally provide inline actions such as Bookmark/Add to Favorites directly from the results list.

incoming_params.description: Optional search keyword to prefilter spreads (e.g., 'love').
Optional difficulty filter value (e.g., 'beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced').
Optional theme filter (e.g., 'love', 'career').
Sort option for spreads list, such as 'rating_desc' or 'newest'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a spread title in the results list (open in same or new tab)
Click 'View Favorites' after bookmarking a tarot spread

access_methods.description: Header 'Tarot Spreads' link navigates directly to this listing page
Footer 'Tarot Spreads' link navigates to this page
Filters and search criteria preserved via query parameters for deep links and pagination
Search field and filter panel submit to refresh spread results

pages.name: Tarot Spread Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single tarot spread guide, showing full instructions and allowing bookmarking. Used to compare card counts and reading time for beginner love spreads.
primary_functions: Present full instructions for the spread, including layout diagram, card positions, and interpretation guidance.
Show key stats such as number of cards and estimated reading time prominently near the top.
Provide a Bookmark/Add to Favorites button to save this spread for later practice.
Show related spreads or articles to encourage further exploration.

incoming_params.description: TarotSpread.id of the spread to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Favorites' after bookmarking the spread
Click 'Back to all spreads' or similar navigation link
Click a related article in the related content section

access_methods.description: Spread loaded by id query parameter
Accessed from Tarot Spreads listing, homepage featured spread, or Favorites

pages.name: Tarot Card Meanings Index
pages.description: Index and search page for all tarot card meanings. Supports browsing by arcana and suit as well as quick searching by card name.
primary_functions: List tarot cards by suit, major/minor arcana, or alphabetical order.
Provide a search field to quickly find a card by name (e.g., typing Tower).
Filter or browse cards to discover new ones and their meanings.
Link each card entry to its Tarot Card Detail page.

incoming_params.description: Optional search query to focus on a specific card name (e.g., 'Tower').
Optional arcana filter value ('major_arcana' or 'minor_arcana').
Optional suit filter: 'wands', 'cups', 'swords', 'pentacles', or 'none'.
Optional sort option like 'name_asc' or 'arcana_then_number'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a card name in the card index or search results

access_methods.description: Header 'Tarot Card Meanings' link opens this index
Footer 'Tarot Card Meanings' link opens this index
Card filters and search criteria encoded in query parameters
Search field and filter controls submit to refresh card list

pages.name: Tarot Card Detail
pages.description: Detailed meaning page for a specific tarot card such as The Tower. Includes journaling prompts with the ability to save shortened prompts as notes.
primary_functions: Display upright and reversed meanings, symbolism, and guidance for the card.
Show a Journaling Prompts section with one or more prompts for reflection.
Provide an Add to Notes or Save Prompt action near each prompt to open a note-creation popup.
Allow users to edit and save a shortened version of a prompt (e.g., under 120 characters) into their Notes.
Surface related spreads and articles that feature this card.

incoming_params.description: TarotCard.id of the card to display (e.g., for 'The Tower').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View All Notes' after saving a journaling prompt as a note
Click 'Back to card index' link to return to filtered card list
Click related spreads that feature this card
Click a related article linked near the card meanings

access_methods.description: Card loaded by id query parameter
Linked from Tarot Card Meanings index, related content, or Notes

pages.name: Compatibility
pages.description: Compatibility search and results page for comparing two zodiac signs. Supports sorting by metrics like most commented to find active discussions.
primary_functions: Provide two zodiac dropdowns to select sign combinations (e.g., Leo and Aquarius).
Offer a Show Results button that loads compatibility articles for the chosen pair.
Display a list of compatibility articles with metadata such as estimated reading time and comment count.
Provide sorting options such as Most Commented to prioritize highly discussed readings.
Link each result card to the Article Detail page for full compatibility readings.

incoming_params.description: First zodiac sign in the pair, e.g., 'leo'.
Second zodiac sign in the pair, e.g., 'aquarius'.
Sort order such as 'most_commented' or 'recent'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a compatibility article title in the results list

access_methods.description: Header 'Compatibility' link navigates to this page
Homepage compatibility tile links into this page
Selected signs and sort order represented in query parameters for deep links
Compatibility form (two dropdowns + Show Results) submits to refresh results

pages.name: Moon Phases / Lunar Calendar
pages.description: Calendar view of moon phases and signs for each month. Used to navigate to specific lunar events like 'Full Moon in Aries' and plan associated rituals.
primary_functions: Display a month selector to navigate to specific months (e.g., October 2023).
Show a calendar grid with moon phases and associated zodiac signs (e.g., Full Moon in Aries) labeled on the relevant dates.
Allow users to click on a moon phase date to open its Moon Event Detail page.
Optionally provide a list or legend view summarizing key events for the selected month.

incoming_params.description: Month (1–12) to display in the lunar calendar; defaults to current month.
Year for the selected month; defaults to current year.
Optional alternate view mode such as 'calendar' or 'list'; defaults to 'calendar'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a date cell labeled with a specific moon event (e.g., 'Full Moon in Aries')
Click a 'View in Planner' CTA to see scheduled rituals for the displayed month

access_methods.description: Header 'Moon Phases' link opens this lunar calendar page
Footer 'Moon Phases' link opens this page
Month/year driven by query parameters for deep-linkable month views
Month/year selector reloads the calendar with updated query parameters

pages.name: Moon Event Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific lunar event such as the Full Moon in Aries. Shows event information and links to related ritual guides.
primary_functions: Present key information about the selected moon event (date, time, sign, themes, and guidance).
List related ritual guides or articles, including a Full Moon in Aries Ritual guide that links to its Article Detail page.
Optionally provide a quick action to add the event itself to the ritual planner or open the relevant ritual guide for planning.

incoming_params.description: MoonEvent.id of the lunar event to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Full Moon in Aries Ritual' or similar ritual guide link
Click 'View in Planner' after creating a ritual planner entry from the moon event

access_methods.description: Moon event loaded by id query parameter
Accessed by clicking a moon event in the lunar calendar or from the Planner

pages.name: Search Results
pages.description: Global search results page for finding articles across the site. Supports searching topics like Mercury retrograde with date range filters and rating sort.
primary_functions: Accept search queries from the header search bar (e.g., Mercury retrograde) and display matching results.
Provide date range filters such as Last 12 Months and support custom ranges.
Offer sort options like Rating: High to Low, Most Recent, or Most Popular.
Show each result with title, snippet, rating, date, and actions like Add to Favorites or Save to Reading List.
Link results to the Article Detail page for full reading.

incoming_params.description: Search query string (e.g., 'Mercury retrograde').
Date filter such as 'last_12_months' or custom encoded range.
Sort option like 'rating_desc', 'newest', or 'relevance'.
Optional encoded JSON or key-value filters for article_type, zodiac_sign, etc.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a search result title or 'Read More' link
Click 'View Favorites' after favoriting search results
Click 'View Reading List' after saving search results

access_methods.description: Global search bar submits to this page with query and initial sort
Query, date range, and sort encoded in URL for shareable search URLs
Subsequent refinements update the URL and reload results

pages.name: Reading List
pages.description: Central place for articles saved for later reading. Displays saved items from related sections, horoscopes, and search.
primary_functions: Display a list of articles that have been saved via Save to Reading List actions (e.g., related articles from horoscopes).
Provide sorting and filtering controls (e.g., by date saved, topic, zodiac sign).
Allow users to open any saved article in the Article Detail page.
Allow removal of items from the reading list.

incoming_params.description: Sort order for saved items, e.g., 'saved_at_desc' (default) or 'reading_time_asc'.
Optional encoded filters by topic, zodiac_sign, or article_type.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a saved article title to open it

access_methods.description: Header 'My Library' link routes to the Reading List page by default
Footer 'Reading List' link opens this page
Links from CTAs after saving an article bring the user here
Sorting and filters preserved in query string

pages.name: Collections
pages.description: Page for managing named collections of saved items such as grouped horoscopes (e.g., 'Capricorn Career').
primary_functions: List all existing collections (e.g., Capricorn Career) with basic metadata.
Allow creation of new collections from scratch or via Save to Collection flows.
Show the contents of a selected collection, including weekly horoscope articles (Week 1, Week 2, Week 3, etc.).
Allow opening items within a collection in the Article Detail page.
Provide options to rename or delete collections and remove individual items.

incoming_params.description: Optional Collection.id to open a specific collection detail directly.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an article inside a collection such as 'Capricorn Career - Week 2'

access_methods.description: Footer 'Collections' link opens the collections manager
Links from 'Save to Collection' flows and CTAs can deep-link into a particular collection
Selected collection id is encoded in query parameters when viewing collection detail

pages.name: Favorites
pages.description: Page for viewing and managing all favorited content (articles, spreads, and similar items). Used to review bookmarked tarot spreads and top-rated articles.
primary_functions: Display a list of items added via Add to Favorites or Bookmark actions, including Mercury retrograde articles and tarot spreads.
Provide filters by content type (e.g., articles, tarot spreads, rituals).
Allow sorting by rating, date favorited, or recency.
Allow opening any favorite item in its respective detail page (Article Detail or Tarot Spread Detail).
Allow removal of items from Favorites.

incoming_params.description: Optional filter for favorite items such as 'article' or 'tarot_spread'.
Optional sort order such as 'saved_at_desc' or 'rating_desc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a favorited article title
Click a favorited tarot spread title

access_methods.description: Footer 'Favorites' link opens this page
Accessed from 'Add to Favorites' confirmations and My Library area
Filtering and sorting preserved in the query string

pages.name: Notes
pages.description: Notes workspace for saved prompts and user-written reflections. Aggregates notes from tarot card prompts and manual entries.
primary_functions: List all saved notes, including shortened journaling prompts saved from tarot card pages.
Allow viewing and editing of note content and associated metadata (e.g., related card or article).
Provide search and basic organization (e.g., by tag or date created).
Allow deletion of notes the user no longer needs.

incoming_params.description: Optional search term to filter notes by content.
Optional tag filter (e.g., 'Tower', 'Full Moon', 'journal').
Sort order such as 'created_at_desc' or 'title_asc'.
Optional note to highlight or scroll to after creation.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a reference to a tarot card from which the note originated
Click a reference to an article source for a note

access_methods.description: Footer 'Notes' link opens the notes workspace
Linked from note creation confirmations and My Library area
Search, filter, and selected note encoded in URL parameters

pages.name: Planner
pages.description: Ritual planner page with calendar view for scheduled moon and ritual activities. Shows entries created from ritual guide articles and lunar events.
primary_functions: Display a calendar or agenda view of scheduled rituals, including entries created from ritual guide articles.
Show details for each scheduled ritual such as title, date, time, and notes (e.g., Try this Aries full moon ritual with candles and journaling.).
Allow editing or rescheduling of existing ritual entries and deletion when no longer needed.
Allow creating new planner entries manually or via links from ritual or moon event pages.
Provide navigation to open the linked ritual article in Article Detail.

incoming_params.description: Planner view mode such as 'month', 'week', or 'agenda'. Defaults to 'month'.
Month to display in calendar view when view='month'.
Year to display in calendar view when view='month'.
Optional date range for agenda/weekly views.
Specific date (ISO string) to scroll to or highlight after scheduling a ritual.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a ritual entry’s title to open the underlying ritual guide article
Click the moon event associated with a scheduled ritual

access_methods.description: Header 'Ritual Planner' link opens the planner page
Footer 'Ritual Planner' link opens the planner page
Accessed from 'Plan This Ritual' flows in articles and moon events
View mode and date range encoded in query parameters

pages.name: Content Preferences
pages.description: Personalization settings page for tailoring the content feed to the users interests, zodiac sign, content mix, and article length preferences.
primary_functions: Allow selection of primary zodiac sign (e.g., Libra) via a dropdown.
Allow choosing multiple interest tags, including at minimum Love, Career, Tarot Spreads, Daily Horoscopes, and Moon Phases.
Provide a Content Type Balance slider or control to set the ratio between tarot and astrology content (e.g., 70% tarot / 30% astrology).
Allow selection of preferred article length (e.g., Short under 7 minutes).
Provide a Save Preferences or Apply button to store settings and update the homepage feed accordingly.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Save Preferences' or 'Apply' to return to an updated personalized homepage feed
Click a 'View Today’s Horoscope' CTA after setting primary sign

access_methods.description: Header 'Content Preferences' link navigates here
Footer 'Content Preferences' link navigates here
Homepage and other CTAs may prompt first-time users to configure preferences on this page

pages.name: About
pages.description: Informational page about the astrology and tarot blog. Provides philosophy, contact details, and disclaimers.
primary_functions: Explain the purpose and philosophy of the site and its approach to astrology and tarot.
Provide basic contact information or a contact method (e.g., email link).
Present disclaimers or site policies relevant to spiritual and predictive content.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Back to Home' link on the About page

access_methods.description: Footer 'About' link opens this informational page
Can be linked directly from outside the site (e.g., social profiles, emails)
